LightningComponentBundle.description: Vertical timeline of stage transitions for a Work Item, showing old/new stage, user, duration, and relative time.

property.name: workItemId
property.label: Work Item Id
property.description: Override the record Id (leave blank to use the page record Id)

property.name: workItemId
property.label: Work Item Id
property.description: The Work Item Id to display stage history for
